problem.title: LiTAMIN2 cluster T1 on KITTI seq 02 full (4661 frames, CT-ICP's worst seq)
problem.question: seq 00/07/08 all pick cluster T1. seq 02 is CT-ICP's worst seq (50.63 m best, own cluster C). Does LiTAMIN2 cluster T1 collapse seq 02 too, or does seq 02 break LiTAMIN2's universal-recipe streak?

variants.label: cluster T1: voxel=0.5 + iter=12 + seed
variants.intent: Test cluster T1 on the long winding seq 02.
